content.full_text:
March 25, 2010

Edin Zulovic
Campaign to Re-Elect Chuck Reed
1898 The Alameda
San Jose, CA 95126

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our File No. W-10-039

Dear Mr. Zulovic:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice per your voicemail message left for Dixie Howard, Assistant Division Chief for the Technical Assistance Division, on March 24, 2010.

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Kevin S. Moen, PhD
Political Reform Consultant II
Technical Assistance Division

KM:jgl
